tokens.range: a mother (as the bond of the family); in a wide sense (both literally and figuratively (like father))

tokens.text: as a child that is weaned
tokens.range: to treat a person (well or ill), i.e. benefit or requite; by implication (of toil), to ripen, i.e. (specifically) to wean

tokens.text: is even as a weaned child
tokens.range: to treat a person (well or ill), i.e. benefit or requite; by implication (of toil), to ripen, i.e. (specifically) to wean
to be dumb; by implication, to be astonished, to stop; also to perish
properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
properly, to level, i.e. equalize; figuratively, to resemble; by implication, to adjust (i.e. counterbalance, be suitable, compose, place, yield, etc.)

flags.note: נֶפֶשׁ — "soul" (Greek-influenced: non-material self) vs. "life" (the whole living person) vs. "self" (the person as subject). Hebrew nefesh is embodied, not a separate immaterial substance.

2.struct: contains a main verb; ⚑ theologically contested vocabulary

tokens.range: to soar, i.e. be lofty; figuratively, to be haughty
great (in any sense); hence, older; also insolent
David, the youngest son of Jesse
to walk (in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively)
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything

elevation, i.e. the act (literally, a journey to a higher place, figuratively, a thought arising), or (concretely) the condition (literally, a step or grademark, figuratively, a superiority of station
an eye (literally or figuratively); by analogy, a fountain (as the eye of the landscape)
properly, perhaps to separate, i.e. distinguish (literally or figuratively); by implication, to be (causatively, make) great, difficult, wonderful
to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively)
a song; abstractly, singing

flags.note: יהוה — The divine name (YHWH). LORD (small caps) hides the personal name. Yahweh/Jehovah are reconstructions of the consonants. The MKT's choice shapes the reader's sense of intimacy with God.

tokens.range: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
to wait; by implication, to be patient, hope
Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also (typically) of his posterity
as far (or long, or much) as, whether of space (even unto) or time (during, while, until) or degree (equally with)
properly, concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always

flags.note: יהוה — The divine name (YHWH). LORD (small caps) hides the personal name. Yahweh/Jehovah are reconstructions of the consonants. The MKT's choice shapes the reader's sense of intimacy with God.
עוֹלָם — "eternal" / "everlasting" / "age-long." Like Greek αἰώνιος, debate centers on whether this is absolute timelessness or the span of an era.
